title: FMD - Both earbuds connected
scenario: Find My Device in Lens app shows both earbuds as a single device on the map for Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20
steps: Open the Poly Lens app on your mobile device.
Ensure a Poly Voyager Free 60+ (Osprey) device is connected via Bluetooth.
Navigate to the Find My Device feature within the app.
Observe the map view showing the location of the connected earbuds.
expected: Both earbuds (left and right) should be recognized and displayed as two separate devices on the map.
